name: Solana
fullText: "To run stablecoins, you need stable rails. You need a network that is secure, efficient, fast, and cheap. You can't find anyone better than Solana." - Shawn Chan, CEO of @SGB_app https://t.co/DQD3FEvZzF

name: Solar (Solana中文社群)
fullText:
经过半年的筹备，由上海市闵行区相关政府单位支持、@solana 与阿里巴巴 · 上海虹桥阿里中心联合打造的 Solana Shanghai Builder Station 要正式开幕啦！以后 Builder 们在上海有大本营了🤩

🗓️3月20日10:00-18:00，邀你共同见证国内首个 Solana Builder Station 开幕！ https://t.co/ggJw71JAZA
